## roo introspect

Show the current identity as the gateway sees it

```
roo introspect [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --as string   introspect while impersonating a service application
  -h, --help        help for introspect
```

### SEE ALSO

* [roo](roo.md)	 - Consumer CLI for authenticating with the platform and invoking registered applications
